meaning: n.[希神]狮头,羊身,蛇尾的吐火怪物,妖怪,狂想
examples: Religious unity remained as much a chimera as ever.
It was childish nonsense—the chimera of frazzled ganglia.
According to legend, the chimera prowled the land of Lycia, now in Turkey, terrorizing inhabitants.
The artistry bolsters the theory of scholars that the Chimera had a religious purpose.
